CustomMetadata.label: FUE-003 - No maximum file upload size configured

values.value: No maximum file upload size configured
FileUploadAndDownloadSecuritySettings has no maximum upload size configured (MaxUploadSizeInBytes is null or 0). Users can upload files of arbitrary size.

Without a file size limit, users or attackers can upload arbitrarily large files, consuming storage quota, causing timeout errors in downstream processing, and potentially enabling denial-of-service conditions.
Set a maximum upload size in Setup > Security > File Upload and Download Security. 25MB is a reasonable default for most orgs. Adjust based on documented business requirements.
